scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w infra
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w infra
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w infra
